content.text: I'll start by inspecting the current configuration of the spark-pi namespace. Let me run the audit commands in parallel.

input.command: kubectl get deploy spark-master spark-worker -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1

apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-master","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-master"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-master","component":"master"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT\n/opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh\ntail -f /opt/spark/logs/*\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-master","ports":[{"containerPort":7077,"name":"spark"},{"containerPort":8080,"name":"webui"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T10:24:10Z"
    generation: 1
    name: spark-master
    namespace: spark-pi
    resourceVersion: "313192"
    uid: 9610418e-3b69-47f3-ad56-504042e1250c
  spec:
    progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
    replicas: 1
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: spark-master
    strategy:
      rollingUpdate:
        maxSurge: 25%
        maxUnavailable: 25%
      type: RollingUpdate
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: spark-master
          component: master
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
            /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
            tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-master
          ports:
          - containerPort: 7077
            name: spark
            protocol: TCP
          - containerPort: 8080
            name: webui
            protocol: TCP
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-pi
        serviceAccountName: spark-pi
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    availableReplicas: 1
    conditions:
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-18T10:25:08Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-18T10:25:08Z"
      message: Deployment has minimum availability.
      reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Available

      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-18T10:25:08Z"
      message: ReplicaSet "spark-master-7d9fdd4d4" has successfully progressed.
      reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Progressing
    observedGeneration: 1
    readyReplicas: 1
    replicas: 1
    updatedReplicas: 1
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-worker","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-worker"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-worker","component":"worker"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","/opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077\ntail -f /opt/spark/logs/*\n"],"env":[{"name":"SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY","value":"1G"},{"name":"SPARK_WORKER_CORES","value":"1"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-worker","ports":[{"containerPort":8081}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T10:24:10Z"

    namespace: spark-pi

    template:

          app: spark-worker
          component: worker
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash

            /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077

          env:

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: batch/v1
  kind: Job
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-nonexistent"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T10:24:25Z"
    generation: 1
    labels:
      app: spark-pi
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5492ff7a-efb0-4ccd-bc94-6c95db9f1e55
      batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
      component: driver
      controller-uid: 5492ff7a-efb0-4ccd-bc94-6c95db9f1e55
      job-name: spark-pi
    name: spark-pi
    namespace: spark-pi
    resourceVersion: "313134"
    uid: 5492ff7a-efb0-4ccd-bc94-6c95db9f1e55
  spec:
    backoffLimit: 0
    completionMode: NonIndexed
    completions: 1
    manualSelector: false
    parallelism: 1
    podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5492ff7a-efb0-4ccd-bc94-6c95db9f1e55
    suspend: false
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: spark-pi
          batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5492ff7a-efb0-4ccd-bc94-6c95db9f1e55
          batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
          component: driver
          controller-uid: 5492ff7a-efb0-4ccd-bc94-6c95db9f1e55
          job-name: spark-pi
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            echo "=============================================="
            echo "  SparkPi Job"
            echo "=============================================="
            export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
            /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
              --master local[2] \
              --driver-memory 512m \
              --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
              /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
              1000
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            exit $EXIT_CODE
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-submit
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: "512"
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Never
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-nonexistent
        serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    ready: 0
    startTime: "2026-06-18T10:24:26Z"
    terminating: 0
    uncountedTerminatedPods: {}
kind: List
metadata:
  resourceVersion: ""

            EXIT_CODE=$?
            echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            exit $EXIT_CODE
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-submit
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: "512"
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Never
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-nonexistent
        serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    ready: 0
    startTime: "2026-06-18T10:24:26Z"
    terminating: 0
    uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

input.content:
SPARK-PI NAMESPACE COMPLIANCE AUDIT (read-only)
Date: 2026-06-18  |  Namespace: spark-pi  |  Auditor: automated config audit
Scope: RBAC, resource limits, image provenance, job security context, network policy.

=== COMPLIANT / CORRECTLY CONFIGURED ===

[RBAC] Role "spark-pi-role" is namespace-scoped and least-privilege oriented:
  - Limited to resources services, configmaps, persistentvolumeclaims (core API group).
  - No wildcard verbs/resources; no access to secrets, pods, pods/exec, or RBAC objects.
  - No ClusterRole / cluster-wide grant; no cluster-admin binding.
[RBAC] RoleBinding "spark-pi-role-binding" correctly binds spark-pi-role to the
  dedicated ServiceAccount "spark-pi" (namespace spark-pi). Subject scoping is correct.
[RBAC] A dedicated ServiceAccount "spark-pi" exists and is used by the master/worker
  Deployments instead of the default ServiceAccount.
[RESOURCES] spark-master and spark-worker Deployments both set CPU and memory
  requests (200m / 512Mi) and limits (500m / 1Gi). Limits are present and sane.
[IMAGE] spark-master and spark-worker use a pinned image tag from a reputable
  registry: apache/spark:3.5.3 (not :latest, not an untrusted source).

=== GAPS / FINDINGS (NOT remediated - read-only audit) ===

[HIGH][IMAGE PROVENANCE] Job "spark-pi" driver references a non-existent/invalid
  image tag: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent. The tag does not exist; the job cannot
  pull/start (job status ready=0, no pods running). Indicates an unvalidated/incorrect
  image reference. Expected pinned valid tag (e.g. apache/spark:3.5.3).
[HIGH][RBAC] Job "spark-pi" sets serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent, which does
  NOT exist in the namespace. The driver pod has no valid identity; this is a
  misconfiguration (and would silently fall back / fail to schedule properly).
[MEDIUM][SECURITY CONTEXT] No security context is set anywhere:
  - spark-master Deployment: pod securityContext {} and no container securityContext.
  - spark-worker Deployment: pod securityContext {} and no container securityContext.
  - Job "spark-pi": pod securityContext {} and no container securityContext.
  Missing: runAsNonRoot, runAsUser, allowPrivilegeEscalation: false,
  readOnlyRootFilesystem, capabilities drop ALL, seccompProfile. Containers may run
  as root with default (privileged-leaning) settings.
[MEDIUM][RESOURCES] Job "spark-pi" has a malformed memory request: requests.memory
  is "512" (no unit -> interpreted as 512 bytes), while the limit is 1Gi. This is
  almost certainly intended to be 512Mi. Mismatched/invalid resource specification.
[MEDIUM][NETWORK POLICY] No NetworkPolicy objects exist in the namespace. All
  ingress/egress to spark-master (7077/8080), spark-worker (8081), and the driver is
  unrestricted (default-allow). No network segmentation/isolation is enforced.

=== ENVIRONMENT NOTES ===
- Pods running: spark-master (1/1) and spark-worker (1/1). Job spark-pi not running.
- ConfigMaps: only default kube-root-ca.crt present (no app config exposed).
- default ServiceAccount exists but is unused by workloads (good).

NOTE: This is a read-only audit. No remediation was performed; remediation to be
planned separately after review.
